title: He Was Missing for 3 Years. They Found Him in the Forest.
script: He vanished for 3 years? Ayi Solehudin, 45, walked into the Gunung Halimun Salak forest in Cianjur, Indonesia — and disappeared. His family searched everywhere. Filed reports. Ran out of hope. Then on May 25th, local villagers went out to inspect a water channel near the forest. That's when they found him — sitting on a mossy rock near a river at 1 kilometer altitude. Emaciated. Weak. Barely able to communicate. He'd survived alone in one of Indonesia's most remote mountain forests for nearly 3 years. Rescuers built a stretcher from wood and a sarong to carry him down. His family says he's recovering. And nobody — not his family, not the rescuers, not even Ayi — can fully explain how he survived the Gunung Halimun Salak for that long?
